displayData.name: Windows Defender 防火墙动态会话
Modern Network Isolation Diagnostics Bfe Session
Inbound IP Packet v4 Discard Layer
Inbound IP Packet v6 Discard Layer
Outbound IP Packet v4 Discard Layer
Outbound IP Packet v6 Discard Layer
WFP Built-in IPsec Forward Inbound Tunnel v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Verifies that each received packet that is supposed to arrive over a tunnel mode security association arrives securely.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Forward Outbound Tunnel v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Indicates to IPsec the outbound traffic that must be secured over a tunnel mode security association.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Forward Inbound Tunnel v6 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Verifies that each received packet that is supposed to arrive over a tunnel mode security association arrives securely.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Forward Outbound Tunnel v6 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Indicates to IPsec the outbound traffic that must be secured over a tunnel mode security association.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Inbound Transport v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Verifies that each received packet that is supposed to arrive over a transport mode security association arrives securely.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Inbound Tunnel v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Verifies that each received packet that is supposed to arrive over a tunnel mode security association arrives securely.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in Silent Drop Transport v4 Discard Layer Callout
displayData.description: Implements stealth-mode filtering by silently dropping all incoming packets for which TCP does not have a listening endpoint.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Inbound Transport v6 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Verifies that each received packet that is supposed to arrive over a transport mode security association arrives securely.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Inbound Tunnel v6 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Verifies that each received packet that is supposed to arrive over a tunnel mode security association arrives securely.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in Silent Drop Transport v6 Discard Layer Callout
displayData.description: Implements stealth-mode filtering by silently dropping all incoming packets for which TCP does not have a listening endpoint.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Outbound Transport v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Indicates to IPsec the outbound traffic that must be secured over transport mode security associations.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Outbound Tunnel v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Indicates to IPsec the outbound traffic that must be secured over tunnel mode security associations.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Outbound Transport v6 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Indicates to IPsec the outbound traffic that must be secured over transport mode security associations.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Outbound Tunnel v6 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Indicates to IPsec the outbound traffic that must be secured over tunnel mode security associations.

displayData.name: STREAM_FILTER
displayData.description: Filter used to capture Stream traffic

displayData.name: STREAM_FILTER
displayData.description: Filter used to capture Stream traffic

displayData.name: Inbound ICMP Error v4 Discard Layer
Inbound ICMP Error v6 Discard Layer
Outbound ICMP Error v4 Discard Layer
Outbound ICMP Error v6 Discard Layer
WFP Built-in Edge Traversal ALE Resource Assignment v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Signals Windows when an application is attempting to bind to an interface and has opted in for edge traversing traffic.

displayData.name: ALE Resource Assignment v4 Discard Layer
WFP Built-in Edge Traversal ALE Resource Assignment v6 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Signals Windows when an application is attempting to bind to an interface and has opted in for edge traversing traffic.

displayData.name: ALE Resource Assignment v6 Discard Layer
WFP Built-in Edge Traversal ALE Listen v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Signals Windows when an application is attempting to listen on an interface and has opted in for edge traversing traffic.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in Edge Traversal ALE Listen v6 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Signals Windows when an application is attempting to listen on an interface and has opted in for edge traversing traffic.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Inbound Initiate Secure v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Verifies that each incoming connection that is supposed to arrive secure arrives securely.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in TCP Chimney Offload ALE Receive/Accept v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Enables or disables TCP Chimney Offload for each incoming connection.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec Inbound Tunnel ALE Receive/Accept v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Permits IPsec tunnel mode IP-in-IP packets when they get classified at the ALE receive/accept layer.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in TCP Templates ALE Receive/Accept v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Applies TCP Template for each incoming connection.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in Set Option ALE Receive/Accept v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Sets classify options on inbound flows.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in Policy Silent Mode ALE Receive/Accept v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Audit and log policy for incoming connection.

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter allows non-AppContainers to receive loopback traffic from other non-AppContainers

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter allows non-AppContainers to receive loopback traffic from by policy allowed AppContainers

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter allows an AppContainer to receive loopback traffic from itself

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter blocks AppContainer loopback traffic

displayData.name: UWP Default Inbound Block Rule
displayData.description: This is the UWP Default Inbound Block filter. This filter blocks any inbound packets to UWP apps that do not have the correct capability tokens for listening to a resource.

displayData.name: Allow inbound UDP traffic to CDPSvc port 5050
Allow inbound TCP traffic to CDPSvc from any port to port 5160 (Wi-Fi Direct Transport)
Allow inbound TCP traffic to CDPSvc from any port to port 5040
Allow inbound UDP traffic to fdphost port 3702
Allow inbound UDP traffic to fdphost port 1900
Allow inbound TCP traffic to AJRouter
Allow inbound UDP traffic to AJRouter
Allow Grouping to receive from port 3587
Allow PNRP to send to port 3540
IPsec 策略代理服务强化 - 远程管理
displayData.description: 允许 IPsec 策略代理入站 RPC/TCP 流量用于远程管理

displayData.name: Block all inbound traffic to SearchFilterHost
Block all inbound traffic to SearchProtocolHost
Allow inbound UDP traffic to SNMPTRAP service
Allow all inbound TCP and RPC to SPPEXTCOMOBJ
Allow incoming RPC traffic to VDS
Allow inbound TCP ports 389 and 636 traffic for vmicheartbeat
Allow inbound TCP ports 389 and 636 traffic for vmicheartbeat
Allow inbound UDP traffic to NTP port 123
允许通过 TCP 到块级备份服务(wbengine)的所有入站 RPC 流量
Allow WebThreatDefSvc to receive from port 443

displayData.description: Allow incoming RTSP connections to the Windows Media Player Network Sharing Service

displayData.name: WSH Default Inbound Block
displayData.description: Blocks all inbound traffic for services who have been network hardened

displayData.description: Verifies that each incoming connection that is supposed to arrive secure arrives securely.

displayData.name: WSH Default Inbound Block
displayData.description: Blocks all inbound traffic for services who have been network hardened

displayData.name: WFP Built-in IPsec ALE Connect v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Applies IPsec policy modifiers to client applications.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in TCP Chimney Offload ALE Connect v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Enables or disables TCP Chimney Offload for each outgoing connection.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in Set Option ALE Connect v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Sets classify options on outbound flows.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in TCP Templates ALE Connect v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Applies TCP Template for each outgoing connection.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in Policy Silent Mode ALE Connect v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Audit and log policy for outgoing connection.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in Accept Redirect Proxy Tag ALE Connect v4 Layer Callout
displayData.description: Tags the outgoing connection from an accept redirected proxy app to prevent infinite redirection.

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter allows outbound AppContainer loopback traffic

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter blocks loopback traffic to port 137

displayData.name: AppContainerLoopback
displayData.description: This filter blocks AppContainer loopback traffic

displayData.name: UWP Default Outbound Block Rule
displayData.description: This is the UWP Default Outbound Block filter. This filter blocks any outbound packets from UWP apps that do not have the correct capability tokens for the resource they are trying to reach.

displayData.name: AxInstSV TCP outbound allow
displayData.description: Allow only outbound TCP traffic from AxInstSV

displayData.name: Allow outbound TCP traffic from CDPSvc from any port to port 5040
Allow outbound UDP traffic from any port to CDPSvc port 5050

displayData.description: Redirects the inbound connection to the address in the provider context.

displayData.description: Redirects the inbound connection to the address in the provider context.

displayData.description: Applies provider context specified policy to the connection.

displayData.description: Applies provider context specified policy to the connection.

displayData.name: Microsoft Corporation
displayData.description: Microsoft Windows WFP Built-in IKEEXT provider used to identify filters added by IKE/AuthIP.

displayData.description: Microsoft Windows IPsec 策略代理

displayData.description: Microsoft Windows WFP Built-in TCP Chimney Offload provider used to identify filters added by TCP Chimney Offload.

displayData.description: Microsoft Windows WFP Built-in MPSSVC App Isolation provider.

displayData.description: Microsoft Windows WFP Built-in IPsec DoS Protection configuration provider used to identify filters added by IPsec Denial of Service Protection.

displayData.description: Microsoft Windows WFP Built-in TCP Templates provider used to identify filters added by TCP Template based configuration.

displayData.description: Microsoft Windows Defender 防火墙 IPsec 提供程序

displayData.name: WFP Built-in Default Secure Socket AuthIP Policy Provider Context
displayData.description: Authenticated Internet Protocol (AuthIP) main mode default policy for secure sockets.

displayData.name: WFP Built-in Default Secure Socket IPsec Policy Provider Context
displayData.description: Internet Protocol Security (IPsec) quick mode default policy for secure sockets.
